content:
Hi! Actually, I don’t have access to the internet. Instead, my answers come from a mixture of:

- A large dataset of text I was trained on, which includes books, articles, websites, and other written material up until my knowledge cutoff (currently June 2024).
- Pattern recognition and language understanding learned during training, allowing me to generate responses based on that data.

I don’t perform live web searches or access external databases in real time. This design helps ensure user privacy and response consistency, but it also means I might not have the very latest information or real-time facts. If you have any questions about how I work or want to dive deeper, feel free to ask!
